body.title: [sprint] Consequence check: Ponder Stibbons device scaffold
body.intention: I intend to verify that the Ponder scaffold did not accidentally assign him capabilities that belong to other devices.
body.description:
**What changed:** Ponder Stibbons device scaffolded as human-facing coordinator placeholder.
**Predicted unintended effects:** Role description in __init__.py may drift from the design conversation intent; future sprints may add capabilities to Ponder that belong to Igor (cognition) or Granny (routing); the 'coordinator' framing may be interpreted as 'owns dispatch'.
**Signals to watch:** Review Ponder's capabilities() return value; check that no routing or dispatch logic has been added; confirm the docstring still matches the Radar-equivalent role description.
**Gate condition:** Check by 2026-06-23.

**Affected files:** None — observation and verification only
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Observe predicted effects; annotate outcome as occurred / clear / partial and close
**Test plan:** no tests — this is an observation ticket
